tests.test_name: Swift - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Swift test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid, fully-resolved JSON output containing at least one named test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Swift - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'swift_single_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Swift - PO - struct+for data-driven expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven Swift fixture and verifies that the analyser expands struct+for loops into individual tests, producing at least three distinct named test entries in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Swift - PO - struct+for data-driven expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'swift_datadriven_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty test_name

tests.test_name: Swift - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Swift test fixture and verifies that the analysis returns valid JSON with a fully populated coverage matrix on the first test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Swift - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'swift_single_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', contains 1 or more tests, every test has a non-empty test_name, and the first test has a non-empty test_coverage_matrix array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven Swift fixture and verifies that the analyser collapses all data rows into a single test entry whose coverage matrix rows match the number of examples and conform to the Swift schema.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'swift' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'swift_datadriven_sample.swift', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel is populated; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'swift', contains exactly 1 test, every test has a non-empty test_name, coverage matrix row count matches the data-driven examples, and coverage matrix rows use the correct Swift schema
